info.name: Timothy Backend - Security, Cars & Attractions API
info.description: Postman collection for creating and updating Security Protocols, Car Rentals, and Attractions profiles and their nested types in the Timothy Backend system.

formdata.value:
{
    "securityBusinessName": "Timothy Security Services Ltd",
    "securityName": "Timothy Guard Services",
    "securityBusinessType": "Private Security Agency",
    "securityRegNum": "SEC-1122334",
    "securityRegDate": "2026-03-12",
    "securityPhone": "+1-555-0800",
    "securityEmail": "info@timothysecurity.com",
    "securityTagline": "Your safety, our command",
    "securityProtocolDescription": "Providing armed VIP protection, corporate bodyguards, event security management, and physical property protection services.",
    "securityProtocolType": "Physical Protection",
    "securityBookingCondition": "Minimum 24 hours notice is required for scheduling guard services.",
    "securityCancelationPolicy": "Free cancellation up to 24 hours before guard deployment."
}

formdata.description: Upload a single business logo image (MIME: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF). MaxCount: 1.
Upload up to 5 license/documentation files (MIME: PDF, DOCX, ZIP, etc.). MaxCount: 5.

request.description: Creates a new Security Protocol profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role. The partner user must not provide any other services already (Hotel, Car, or Attraction). Sets `isSecurity` to true on successful creation.

formdata.value:
{
    "securityGuardName": "VIP Armed Close Protection Officer",
    "securityAddress": "12 Security Plaza",
    "securityCity": "Los Angeles",
    "securityPostalCode": "90012",
    "securityDistrict": "Los Angeles County",
    "securityCountry": "United States",
    "securityGuardDescription": "Experienced armed VIP bodyguard specialized in diplomatic and high-profile client protection.",
    "securityServicesOffered": "VIP Protection, Threat Assessment, Secure Transport",
    "experience": 6,
    "availability": "24/7",
    "languages": "English, Spanish",
    "certification": "State Guard Card, Active Firearm Permit",
    "securityPriceDay": 350.00,
    "category": "VIP",
    "discount": 25,
    "securityBookingAbleDays": "Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday",
    "currency": "USD"
}

formdata.description: Upload multiple guard reference/action images (MIME: JPEG, PNG, etc.). MaxCount: 40.

variable.description: The ID of the security protocol this guard type belongs to.

request.description: Creates a new Security Guard Type under a specific Security Protocol. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role. Parses comma-separated values (services, languages, able-days) and safely handles default parameters.

formdata.description: Optionally upload a new logo to replace the current one.

variable.description: The ID of the security protocol to be updated.

request.description: Updates an existing Security Protocol profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and must be owned by the authenticated partner.

formdata.description: Optionally upload new images to append.

variable.description: The ID of the security guard to update.

request.description: Updates an existing Security Guard. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and must own the guard profile.

Upload up to 5 license/documentation files (MIME: PDF, DOCX, ZIP, etc.). MaxCount: 5.

request.description: Creates a new Car Rental profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role. The partner user must not provide any other services already (Hotel, Security, or Attraction). Sets `isCar` to true on successful creation.

formdata.description: Upload multiple car images (MIME: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF). MaxCount: 40.

variable.description: The ID of the car rental business profile this car belongs to.

request.description: Creates a new Car under a specific Car Rental business profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role.

formdata.description: Optionally upload a new logo to replace the current one.

variable.description: The ID of the car rental business profile to update.

request.description: Updates an existing Car Rental business profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and ownership.

formdata.description: Optionally upload new images to append.

variable.description: The ID of the car to update.

request.description: Updates an existing car profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and ownership.

formdata.description: Upload a single business logo image (MIME: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF). MaxCount: 1.
Upload up to 5 license/documentation files (MIME: PDF, DOCX, ZIP, etc.). MaxCount: 5.

request.description: Creates a new Attraction business profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role. The partner user must not provide any other services already (Hotel, Security, or Car). Sets `isAttraction` to true on successful creation.

formdata.description: Upload multiple attraction images (MIME: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, AVIF). MaxCount: 40.

variable.description: The ID of the attraction business profile this appeal belongs to.

request.description: Creates a new Attraction Appeal under a specific Attraction business profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role. Sets schedules and slots.

formdata.description: Optionally upload a new logo to replace the current one.

variable.description: The ID of the attraction business profile to update.

request.description: Updates an existing Attraction business profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and ownership.

formdata.description: Optionally upload new images to append.

variable.description: The ID of the attraction appeal to update.

request.description: Updates an existing Attraction Appeal profile. Requires BUSINESS_PARTNER role and ownership. Safe from schedule wipes if schedules is not passed.
